chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-625 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.2558/2026. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.2559/2026. 4. For order on MA No.2560/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 09.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Hassan Jakhro advocate for petitioner. Petitioner prays for quashing FIR bearing Crime No. 200 of 2025 lodged at Police Station Sehwan under Section 324, 506/2, 114, 147, 148, 149, 337-A (i), 337-F (i) PPC. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that a challan has been submitted in the case before the concerned court. In such circumstances, the petitioner has an alternate remedy under section 249-A or section 265-K Cr.P.C., as the case may be. Admittedly, such remedy has not been availed. The grounds urged in the petition do not bring forth any exceptional circumstances to quash the FIR in constitutional jurisdiction. Therefore, the petition is dismissed along with listed applications leaving the petitioner to aforesaid remedy. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
